name: Kindergarten School Bus
subject: education/kindergarten
prompt: a friendly cartoon school bus with a smiling face on the front, big round headlight eyes, rows of windows along the side, an open folding door, and a small stop sign on the side, parked on a road with a couple of clouds above

name: First Day of Kindergarten
subject: education/kindergarten
prompt: a happy child waving and wearing a backpack standing in front of a school building with a big door and an arched sign reading school, a flag on a pole, a tree and a flower at the side

name: Kindergarten Backpack
subject: education/kindergarten
prompt: a cute filled backpack with a smiling face, two front pockets with a zipper, padded straps, a water bottle tucked in a side pocket, and a pencil and ruler poking out of the top

name: Kindergarten Classroom
subject: education/kindergarten
prompt: a tidy kindergarten classroom scene with a small desk and chair, a chalkboard on the wall showing the letters A B C, a bookshelf with a few books, a clock, and a potted plant on the windowsill

name: Kindergarten Alphabet Letters
subject: education/kindergarten
prompt: four big rounded bubble uppercase letters A B C D arranged in a row, each with a friendly smiling face, sitting on a simple baseline with a few small stars floating around them

name: Kindergarten Counting Numbers
subject: education/kindergarten
prompt: the chunky numbers 1 2 3 in a row, the 1 beside a single apple, the 2 beside two balloons, and the 3 beside three stars, each number drawn as a thick rounded shape easy to color

name: Kindergarten Crayon Box
subject: education/kindergarten
prompt: a cheerful open box of crayons with a smiling face on the box, several tall crayons standing up inside with pointed tips, one crayon resting in front of the box, large simple shapes for easy coloring

name: Kindergarten Pencil Close-Up
subject: education/kindergarten
prompt: a single large smiling pencil shown up close filling most of the frame, a sharpened wooden tip with a point, a tall body with a happy face, and a rounded eraser at the top, a few small doodle stars nearby

name: Kindergarten Shapes
subject: education/kindergarten
prompt: a friendly group of basic shapes each with a smiling face, a circle, a square, a triangle, and a star arranged together, big and simple with thick outlines for the youngest colorers

name: Kindergarten Apple for Teacher
subject: education/kindergarten
prompt: a plump round apple with a cheerful smiling face, a curved stem and a single leaf at the top, a small worm peeking out with a tiny wave, resting on a simple desk surface

name: Kindergarten ABC Blocks
subject: education/kindergarten
prompt: a small stack of cube alphabet blocks, each block showing a single letter on its face spelling A B and C, the blocks slightly tilted and piled together, one extra block resting beside the stack

name: Kindergarten Recess Playground
subject: education/kindergarten
prompt: a sunny kindergarten playground scene with a curved slide, a pair of swings hanging from a frame, a small seesaw, a bouncy ball on the ground, and a smiling sun with a couple of clouds above
